description:
Aldebaran, part of United Robotics Group, offers a range of “Cobiots” - interactive and engaging social Robots designed to perceive their environment and assist people in a responsible manner. Aldebaran newest Cobiot, Plato is built for assisting hospitality and service workers. Learn from Aldebaran how they build their cloud architecture to manage securely their Cobiots, leveraging AWS services like IoT Core, IoT GreenGrass, S3, Kinesis, OpenSearch, Elastic Kubernetes Service (EKS), Lambda functions... The architecture overview walks through the challenges Aldebaran faced in building secure connectivity, remote management of 40,000+ Cobiots in hybrid manner at the edge and on the cloud when devices are connected to internet.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS  #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture #IoT #Cobiots #AWSIoTCore #AWSIoTGreenGrass
fulltitle: Aldebaran: Using IoT Services to Connect, Manage and Deploy Robots from the Cloud
